programs.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programs.desc: The abduction and murder of a pregnant woman and her fiancé from their Decatur home sends shockwaves throughout Atlanta; ransom calls and voicemails turn into digital breadcrumbs for investigators to track the killers down.

programs.title: The Real Murders of Atlanta
programs.desc: Twin daughters find their mother stabbed to death in their quaint suburban home, and the pressure for detectives to deliver justice is on; but when the shocking truth behind the murder comes out, the Atlanta community is left stunned and heartbroken.

programs.title: New York Homicide
programs.desc: When a beloved Staten Island mother vanishes, NYPD detectives have a gut feeling she didn't run off and have trouble believing she abandoned her family; as they retrace her last known whereabouts, CCTV footage leads them to a horrific discovery.

programs.title: New York Homicide
programs.sub_title: Murder on the Upper East Side
programs.desc: In the most expensive zip code in Manhattan, an aging, eccentric art collector is found strangled in his apartment.

programs.title: New York Homicide
programs.desc: When the owner of a Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the news publishes mafia theories, and the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

programs.title: Philly Homicide
programs.desc: A veteran police officer gets attacked in the line of duty; detectives make it their mission to bring his killer to justice; as they investigate a troubled Philadelphia suburb, they soon uncover a crime of the ultimate betrayal.
